Headline: #201 Central/Ridge Temporary Reroute at Central/Prospect
ShortDescription: 201 Central/Ridge buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to festival near Central/Prospect.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#201 Central/Ridge buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Central, Ridge, Emerson, Gulf, Crawford, Central  and over regular route, due to festival near Central/Prospect.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #35 35th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 31st/Rhodes
ShortDescription: 35 35th buses will terminate at 31st/Rhodes due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#35 35th buses will terminate at 31st/Rhodes due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #28 Sony Island Temporary Northbound Reroute near Lake Park/47th
ShortDescription: Northbound 28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted, due to festival near Lake Park/47th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted via Lake Park, 51st, Cottage Grove, Midway Plaisance, and Stony Island over normal route due to festival near Lake Park/47th.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
